name: Six Degrees - Datahop
aka: 6DG, Datahop, UKSolutions, NetworkFlow, BIS, Capital Support Group, Ultraspeed, Firstserv, Cloud Computing Centre, Serverstream
notes:
Six Degrees Group international backbone. All other 6DG businesses will be available behind or merged into AS6908.

Any existing peer who is in a mutual site and would like to arrange private peering should get in contact. We are also available on LINX PI in THNOR, THWST and TCSOV.
